nodes.label: AI as blueprint provider for unfamiliar tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable guide requiring troubleshooting
nodes.grounding_span: The AI gave me a blueprint to follow, but there were hiccups along the way

nodes.label: AI as research starting point
nodes.label_negative: AI as slower or less accurate than own expertise
nodes.grounding_span: It is much faster than combing through message boards

nodes.label: AI code quality and reliability
nodes.label_negative: AI code that is incorrect or unhelpful
nodes.grounding_span: The code it provided worked! It got very close in style to the original reports

nodes.label: AI for repetitive simple tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for complex or domain-specific tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I would honestly rather just have AI do all of the simple tasks or the tasks I know it can handle

nodes.label: AI responsiveness to user feedback
nodes.label_negative: AI ignoring user complaints and repeating errors
nodes.grounding_span: The difference was in how the AI communicated and listened to my complaints

nodes.label: AI as step-by-step guidance tool
nodes.grounding_span: Without a programmer to guide it, it will not be helpful

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: My work needs to get done. I don't care how that is achieved

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: I know the best way to handle this, so AI would honestly just be slower and probably less accurate

nodes.label: Control and reliability in work outcomes
nodes.grounding_span: Without a programmer to guide it, it will not be helpful

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes it was great and I felt really accomplished

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for coding
nodes.grounding_span: Other times, it was a frustrating experience that felt like banging my head against a wall

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI as a tool
nodes.grounding_span: I would honestly rather just have AI do all of the simple tasks

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's assumption of expertise
nodes.grounding_span: Unchecked AI makes a hell of a lot of mistakes

nodes.label: Iterative trial-and-error approach
nodes.grounding_span: I would create my own skeleton, then ask about formatting

nodes.label: Pragmatic tool selection based on effectiveness
nodes.grounding_span: I had to consult multiple models until I found a good one
